ksa_text: Design, build, validate, and document clinical trial databases in electronic data capture systems, including CRF specifications, edit check logic, user acceptance testing, and compliance documentation against study protocols and regulatory requirements.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of implementation) and updated as necessary.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of implementation) and updated as necessary.
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Regulatory Compliance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.407) to justify inclusion for the Deputy CDO. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world Deputy CDO roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for Deputy CDO roles increasingly include Regulatory Compliance competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for Deputy CDO now include Regulatory Compliance competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. Regulatory Compliance task KSA is relevant to the Deputy CDO based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
